title: Hayagriva Madhava Temple
tagline: Hayagriva Madhava Temple — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Hayagriva Madhava Temple is situated on the Manikut hill.
overview.description: Hayagriva Madhava Temple is situated on the Manikut hill. The hill is situated in Hajo of Kamrup District in Assam, India. Which is around 30 km to west of Guwahati. A most striking feature of the temple is the continuous row of elephants carved on the lowest level of the temple walls - a structure akin to the stone cut temple of Ellora.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Hajo
topPlaces.description: Hajo is a historic town set in the hills northwest of Guwahati, Assam, India. It is a meeting point of Buddhists, Hindus and Muslims due to the various pilgrimage sites on the different hills of Hajo.

topPlaces.name: Shri Kedar Temple
topPlaces.description: Shri Kedar Temple (also known as Kedareswara Temple) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at top of Madanachala hill in Hajo, Kamrup, Assam. The central chamber has a linga.

topPlaces.name: Tokradia
topPlaces.description: Tokradia is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated in south bank of river Brahmaputra.

topPlaces.name: Kamrup region
topPlaces.description: Kamrup is the modern region situated between two rivers, the Manas and the Barnadi in Western Assam, with the same territorial extent as the Colonial and post-Colonial "Undivided Kamrup district". It was the capital region of two of the three dynasties of Kamarupa and Guwahati, the current political center of Assam, is situated here.

topPlaces.name: Ramdia
topPlaces.description: Ramdia is an Indian village in Kamrup rural district in the state of Assam. It is situated on the north bank of river Brahmaputra 30 km from the city Guwahati, near Hajo town.

topPlaces.name: Duni, Assam
topPlaces.description: Duni is an urban village of Sipajhar Constituency, Darrang District, Assam, India. It is one of major place in Darrang district.

topPlaces.name: Srihati
topPlaces.description: Srihati is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated near south bank of river Brahmaputra.

topPlaces.name: Siliguri, Kamrup
topPlaces.description: Siliguri is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated near south bank of river Brahmaputra.

items.note: Hajo is a historic town set in the hills northwest of Guwahati, Assam, India. It is a meeting point of Buddhists, Hindus and Muslims due to the various pilgrimage sites on the different hills of Hajo.
Shri Kedar Temple (also known as Kedareswara Temple) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at top of Madanachala hill in Hajo, Kamrup, Assam. The central chamber has a linga.
Tokradia is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated in south bank of river Brahmaputra.

Kamrup is the modern region situated between two rivers, the Manas and the Barnadi in Western Assam, with the same territorial extent as the Colonial and post-Colonial "Undivided Kamrup district". It was the capital region of two of the three dynasties of Kamarupa and Guwahati, the current political center of Assam, is situated here.
Ramdia is an Indian village in Kamrup rural district in the state of Assam. It is situated on the north bank of river Brahmaputra 30 km from the city Guwahati, near Hajo town.
Duni is an urban village of Sipajhar Constituency, Darrang District, Assam, India. It is one of major place in Darrang district.
Srihati is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated near south bank of river Brahmaputra.
Siliguri is a village in Kamrup rural district, situated near south bank of river Brahmaputra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hayagriva Madhava Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hayagriva Madhava Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hayagriva Madhava Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hayagriva Madhava Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hayagriva Madhava Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hayagriva Madhava Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Hayagriva Madhava Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hayagriva Madhava Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hajo, Shri Kedar Temple, Tokradia, Kamrup region, Ramdia.
